q: Do you have a hobby that you've had since childhood?
examiner_note: Trong câu hỏi này, giám khảo muốn nghe về sự bền bỉ (persistence) hoặc sự thay đổi trong sở thích của bạn từ nhỏ đến lớn. Bạn nên sử dụng các thì quá khứ (Past Simple) để kể về khởi đầu và thì hiện tại hoàn thành (Present Perfect) để nói về việc duy trì sở thích đó. Các cụm từ như 'stand the test of time', 'from an early age', 'be a lifelong passion' rất hữu ích.

band7.text: Yes, I’ve been playing the piano since I was about seven years old. It started as a mandatory lesson my parents signed me up for, but over time, I grew to love it. Although I don't practice as much as I used to, it’s still a great way for me to relax.
band7.note: Sử dụng tốt thì hiện tại hoàn thành tiếp diễn. Có sự giải thích về quá trình phát triển sở thích.

band8.text: Absolutely. Reading has been a constant in my life since I was a toddler. My parents used to read me bedtime stories, and that sparked a lifelong passion for literature. Even with the distractions of the digital age, I still find myself getting lost in a good novel whenever I have a spare moment. It’s a hobby that has truly stood the test of time.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ nâng cao như 'a constant in my life', 'sparked a lifelong passion', 'stood the test of time'. Diễn đạt mạch lạc.

band9.text: Indeed, my fascination with sketching originated in my early childhood. I recall spending countless hours doodling in the margins of my notebooks. What began as a mere pastime has evolved into a sophisticated pursuit of digital illustration. While my techniques have undoubtedly matured, that fundamental sense of joy I derive from creating something from scratch remains unchanged. It’s more than just a hobby; it’s an integral part of my identity.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở mức độ C2 (originated, pastime, evolved, matured, derive, integral part). Cách lập luận sâu sắc và thể hiện sự gắn kết chặt chẽ với sở thích.

v.example: Classic hobbies like chess have stood the test of time.
I showed an interest in music from an early age.
Swimming has been a lifelong passion of mine.
I've loved drawing ever since I was a toddler.
The trip to the museum sparked my interest in history.
In the digital age, many kids prefer video games to traditional toys.
I can easily get lost in a good mystery novel.
I've stuck with karate for over ten years now.
Collecting stamps used to be a common pastime.
My photography hobby has evolved into a part-time job.
I derive a lot of joy from baking for my friends.
I love building model planes from scratch.
Music is an integral part of my daily routine.
We love to reminisce about our childhood games.
Seeing old toys makes me feel very nostalgic.

v.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành tính cách
v.example: I spent my formative years learning to play violin.
My artistic upbringing influenced my choice of hobbies.
My parents nurtured my love for science.
He was a gifted pianist even as a child.
Painting with my dad is a precious memory of mine.
We were childhood sweethearts who shared the same hobbies.
I still enjoy old-fashioned hobbies like wood carving.
Knitting can be quite time-consuming but rewarding.

v.meaning: thứ giúp giải tỏa căng thẳng
v.example: Exercise is the best stress-reliever for me.
He's a keen amateur photographer and hobbyist.
I'm just an amateur painter, not a professional.
She approaches every new hobby with great enthusiasm.
Success in any hobby requires time and dedication.
It takes years to attain mastery in martial arts.
He achieved mastery of the language through constant practice.
You have to be persistent to learn a new instrument.
Learning to code requires a lot of perseverance.
Don't get him started on politics; it's his favorite hobby horse.

v.meaning: bận rộn như một chú ong
v.example: I've been busy as a bee with my new gardening project.

v.meaning: công việc làm vì đam mê (không vì tiền)
v.example: Building this website was a true labor of love.

v.meaning: chỉ làm mà không chơi (làm mụ mị đầu óc)
v.example: You need a hobby; all work and no play makes Jack a dull boy.

v.meaning: thời gian rảnh rỗi (không biết làm gì)
v.example: If you're at a loose end this weekend, come help me paint.

v.word: variety is the spice of life
v.meaning: thay đổi là hương vị cuộc sống
v.example: I like trying different hobbies because variety is the spice of life.

v.word: kill two birds with one stone
v.meaning: một mũi tên trúng hai đích
v.example: Cycling to work kills two birds with one stone: exercise and transport.

v.meaning: quay lại với những điều cơ bản
v.example: Sometimes it's good to go back to basics and just enjoy nature.

v.word: burn the candle at both ends
v.example: Don't burn the candle at both ends with too many hobbies.
I need to take a breather after that long hike.
We usually just chill out and watch movies on Sundays.
I go boxing to blow off steam after a tough week.
A quick nap can reinvigorate you for your evening hobbies.
In my freetime, I enjoy playing chess.
What do you usually do in your spare time?
You can browse the collection at your leisure.
The park offers many recreational activities.
Hobbies provide a sense of immediate gratification.
